subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, beside Whom there is no other god, the Most Divine, the Most Divine, and verily all glory floweth from God unto the first Vahid [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الالهم الالهم. الحمد لله الذی لا اله الا هو الالهم الالهم و انما البهاء من الله علی الواحد الاول و من
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Word of God and human limitations
